\tzpentry{ID4214}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4214 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\text{vac}}(r,t) = \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \sum_{i=1}^{N_{\TZP}} (-1)^n \Gamma\left(n+\tfrac{1}{2}\right) K_n\left(\frac{|r-r_{\TZP}^{(i)}|}{\xi}\right) e^{in(\omega_0 t + \theta_i)} \end{equation}
